Results for 'top attractions, temples, fort, heritage sites' in Warangal, Telangana, India:
1. Thousand Pillar Temple [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.5 (32000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 6 AM Fri
   📍 Hanamkonda, Telangana, India
   "The structure is based on Hindu history and cultural heritage."
2. Warangal Fort [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.4 (23000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 8 AM Fri
   📍 Warangal, Telangana, India
   "Historic fort with impressive gateways and stone carvings."
3. Sri Bhadrakali Temple [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (32000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 5 AM Fri
   📍 Warangal, Telangana, India
   "The intricate carvings and stunning architecture are awe-inspiring."
4. Kush Mahal [Historical place] ⭐ 4.4 (1000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 8 AM Fri
   📍 XJ47+F6W Warangal Fort
   "Free entry but construction is very unique and has historical importance"
5. Ekashila Gutta [Historical landmark] ⭐ 4.5 (248 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 9 AM Fri
   📍 Warangal Fort, Near, Fort, Ekashila
   "These structures bear silent witness to the kingdom's past glory."
